name: list_workspace_users
description: Retrieves a paginated list of admin users for a specified slack workspace.

limit.description:
The maximum number of admin users to retrieve per page. Must be a positive integer. If not specified, a default limit set by Slack will apply.
Examples:
  "20"
  "50"
  "100"

cursor.description:
Pagination cursor for retrieving the next page of results. Pass the `next_cursor` value returned from a previous request to fetch subsequent items. If omitted, the first page is retrieved.
Example: "dXNlcjpVMEc5V0ZYTlo="

team_id.description:
The ID of the Slack workspace (e.g., `T123456789`) from which to list admin users.
Example: "T123456789"

arguments.description: Request schema for listing admin users in a Slack workspace.
